title: Positive flow: Selecting a country and confirming the selection
preconditions: The app is open and the search functionality is accessible
test_data: Select a country from the list and tap the 'OK' button
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the search functionality | Tap on the 'Choose country to search in' header | Select a country from the list of countries | Tap the 'OK' button to confirm the selection
expected_result: The selected country is confirmed and the app returns to the previous screen

title: Negative flow: Attempting to confirm an empty selection
preconditions: The app is open and the search functionality is accessible
test_data: No country is selected and the 'OK' button is tapped
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the search functionality | Tap on the 'Choose country to search in' header | Ensure no country is selected | Tap the 'OK' button
expected_result: An error message is displayed indicating that a country must be selected

title: Boundary validation: Selecting the first and last country in the list
preconditions: The app is open and the search functionality is accessible
test_data: Select the first and last country in the list and confirm the selection
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the search functionality | Tap on the 'Choose country to search in' header | Select the first country in the list | Tap the 'OK' button to confirm the selection | Select the last country in the list | Tap the 'OK' button to confirm the selection
expected_result: The selected countries are confirmed and the app returns to the previous screen

title: Usability: Navigating back to the previous screen
preconditions: The app is open and the search functionality is accessible
test_data: Navigate back to the previous screen after selecting a country
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the search functionality | Tap on the 'Choose country to search in' header | Select a country from the list | Tap the 'OK' button to confirm the selection | Navigate back to the previous screen
expected_result: The app returns to the previous screen with the selected country applied

title: Accessibility: Ensuring the 'OK' button is accessible
preconditions: The app is open and the search functionality is accessible
test_data: Ensure the 'OK' button is accessible and functional
test_steps: Open the app and navigate to the search functionality | Tap on the 'Choose country to search in' header | Ensure the 'OK' button is accessible | Tap the 'OK' button to confirm the selection
expected_result: The 'OK' button is accessible and functional
